hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: We are a team of passionate developers building modern web solutions.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To deliver high-quality, scalable web solutions that help businesses grow and succeed in the digital world.

values.title: Quality First
values.description: We never compromise on quality. Every line of code is crafted with care.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We stay ahead of the curve by adopting the latest technologies and best practices.

values.title: Client Focus
values.description: Your success is our success. We work closely with you to understand and meet your needs.

values.title: Transparency
values.description: Open communication and honest feedback are at the core of how we work.

story.title: Our Story
paragraphs: Founded with a vision to make professional web development accessible to businesses of all sizes.
We specialize in building custom websites that are not only beautiful but also performant and easy to manage.
Our team brings together years of experience in web development, design, and digital strategy.
